design_principle: Design shouldn't be an afterthought, it's a principle.
usability_rule: User expectations are a rule, not a suggestion.
based_on_ubuntu: Based on the latest Ubuntu 26.04 LTS for robust stability and support.
experimental_only: This project is in an experimental status due to multiple technical and legal issues that need to be resolved before a stable release can be made. Do not use this OS if you are not a developer or tester.
support_us: Please consider [buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/codeswallop) and [contributing to the project](https://github.com/Proman4713/Utile-OS).
made_with_passion: Made with passion by Aaser Abd-el Sabour (Proman4713).
